reviews.comment:
Un lugar para cargar nafta, nada mas. No hay cafeteria ni kiosco. Los baños son limpios. Si van desde Belen cuidado cuando esten llegando para aqui (aprox 1 km antes) hay badenes muy profundos los cuales para pasarlos hay que parar casi en seco el vehiculo

(Translated by Google)
A place to fill up with gas, nothing more. There's no cafe or kiosk. The restrooms are clean. If you're coming from Belén, be careful when you're approaching here (about 1 km before) because there are very deep dips in the road that require you to almost stop your vehicle to get over them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPX0xhVkt3EAE

reviewer.displayName: VIVASMA Viva y Vacacione en San Martin de los Andes

reviews.comment:
Excelente estacion de servicio. Baños nuevos y limpios. Excelente atención. Ingresen vale la pena.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent gas station. New and clean restrooms. Excellent service. Go in, it's worth it.

reviews.comment:
Fui atendido muy cordialmente y pude pagar con QR. La estación de servicio es bastante nueva y aún carece de otros servicios como local gastronómico y/o YPF full

(Translated by Google)
I received very friendly service and was able to pay with a QR code. The gas station is fairly new and still lacks other amenities such as a restaurant and/or a full YPF station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQycE8ydEJ3EAE
